text:
Engineering Graphics and CAD  
Subject Code - FCME0116 
 
SHEET NO.-6                                        TITLE: PROJECTIONS OF SOLIDS 
 
Question 1: 
Draw  the  projections  of  a  pentagonal  pyramid,  base  30  mm  edge  and  axis  50  mm  long, 
having its base on the HP and an edge of the base parallel to the VP. Also draw its side view. 
 
Question 2: 
Draw  the  projections  of  the  hexagonal  pyramid,  base  30  mm  side  and  axis  60  mm  long, 
having its base on the HP and one of the edges of the base inclined at 45 to the VP. 
 
Question 3: 
Draw the projections of the pentagonal prism, base 25 mm side and axis 50 mm long, resting 
on one of its rectangular faces on the HP with the axis inclined at 45 to the VP. 
 
Question 4: 
Draw the projections  of the cylinder 50  mm diameter and  80  mm long,  lying on the ground 
with its axis inclined at 30 to the VP and parallel to the ground. 
 
Question 5: 
A square prism, base 40 mm side and height 65 mm, has its axis inclined at 45 to the HP and 
has an edge of its base, on the HP and inclined at 30 to the VP. Draw its projections. 
 
Question 6: 
Draw  the projections  of  the  cone,  base  45  mm  diameter  and  axis  50  mm  long,  when  it  is 
resting  on  the  ground  on  a  point  on  its  base  circle  with  (a)  the  axis  making  an  angle  of  30 
with the HP and 45 with the VP; (b) the axis making an angle of 30 with the HP and its top 
view making 45 with the VP.
